'''Trifecta Star''' was a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|route]] stemming from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. It was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and controlled by the [[Binayre Pirates]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
